---
title: "TITLE"
author: "Isabelle Smith"
date:  |+ 
  <em>Created:</em> DD mmm YYYY  
  <em>Generated:</em> `r format(Sys.Date(), '%d %b %Y')`
abstract: ""
output:
  isabelletsmith::izzy_html:
    template: "006-default"
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, warning=FALSE}


knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning=FALSE)


if (!"isabelletsmith" %in% installed.packages()) {
  devtools::install_github("isabelle-smith/isabelletsmith", quiet=TRUE)
}

library(isabelletsmith)


suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))


newline <- "\n"
divider <- "- - - - - - - "


```


&nbsp;



## Section 1

```{r chunk_name_1}


iprint("Hello: ", newline=FALSE)
iprint("World")


```



## Section 2

```{r chunk_name_2}


## more code


```







\newpage



## SCRATCH

```{r SCRATCH-chunk, eval=FALSE}


## ...


```
